keyset.title: Keyset
keyset.subtitle: Profiles, conflicts, and safe auto-fix for Controls
keyset.search.placeholder: Filter binds, keys, categories, or ids
keyset.profile.name: Profile Name
keyset.help.steps: 1. Choose or apply a profile on the left. 2. Search or click a conflict row on the right. 3. Use a direct action or Preview Auto-Fix to fix it safely.
keyset.help.active_profile: Direct edits and auto-fix only change the active profile. If those buttons are disabled, apply the selected profile first.
keyset.help.group_headers: Tip: clicking a group header jumps to the first conflicting bind in that section.
keyset.selection.preview_body: Review the proposed changes in the list below. Next: Apply Preview to accept them, or change the view or search to leave preview mode without saving.
keyset.selection.none_body: Click a conflict row below to inspect it. Next: use Find In Controls to jump to vanilla Controls, Clear Key to remove it now, or Rebind to wait for your next key press.
keyset.selection.binding_body_active: Category: %s | Current key: %s. Next: Find In Controls highlights it, Clear Key saves immediately, and Rebind waits for your next key press.
keyset.selection.binding_body_inactive: Category: %s | Current key: %s. Next: apply %s first if you want Clear Key, Rebind, or Auto-Fix to save into that profile.
keyset.empty.conflicts_body: This profile has no conflicts for the current filter. Try a different search, switch grouping, or load another profile.
keyset.empty.preview_body: The safe auto-fix did not find any changes it can make without breaking protected or sticky bindings.
keyset.footer.default: Hover buttons for help. Apply the profile you want to edit, pick a conflict row, then use a direct action or Preview Auto-Fix.
keyset.footer.inactive: Apply %s first to enable direct edits and Auto-Fix on this profile.
keyset.footer.pick_conflict: Select a conflict row to unlock the action buttons.
keyset.footer.binding_ready: %s is ready. Use Find In Controls, Clear Key, or Rebind.
keyset.footer.preview: Preview mode is read-only. Apply Preview commits these changes; Undo Last Auto-Fix restores the previous live bindings after you apply.
keyset.tip.search: Filter conflicts by bind name, category name, key label, or internal id.
keyset.tip.group: Switch between grouping conflicts by assigned key or by category.
keyset.tip.profile_name: This is the selected profile name. Rename uses this field, and New uses it as the starting name.
keyset.tip.profile_apply: Make the selected profile live immediately and write those bindings into Minecraft controls.
keyset.tip.profile_capture: Copy the current live controls into the selected profile and mark those edits as sticky user choices.
keyset.tip.profile_rename: Rename the selected profile without changing its internal id.
keyset.tip.profile_new: Create a new profile from the current live controls.
keyset.tip.profile_duplicate: Create a copy of the selected profile.
keyset.tip.profile_delete: Delete the selected profile. If it is active, Keyset falls back to Default.
keyset.tip.export: Copy the selected profile as JSON to the clipboard.
keyset.tip.import: Import profile JSON from the clipboard. Name collisions are renamed safely.
keyset.tip.resolve_preview: Generate a safe auto-fix preview for the active profile only.
keyset.tip.resolve_preview_empty: No conflicts are visible for this profile, so there is nothing to preview.
keyset.tip.resolve_apply: Apply the current auto-fix preview to the active profile.
keyset.tip.resolve_undo: Restore the bindings from before the last applied auto-fix.
keyset.tip.resolve_undo_unavailable: Apply an auto-fix before undo becomes available.
keyset.tip.binding_jump: Open the vanilla Controls list focused on this binding.
keyset.tip.binding_clear: Clear the selected binding in the active profile and save it immediately.
keyset.tip.binding_reassign: Open the vanilla Controls list and arm this binding for immediate reassignment.
keyset.tip.binding_preview_mode: Leave preview mode before using direct binding actions.
keyset.tip.actions_require_active: Apply the selected profile first to enable direct edits and auto-fix.
keyset.status.profile_created: Created a new profile from current bindings.
keyset.status.profile_captured: Captured the current live bindings into the selected profile.
keyset.status.exported: Copied the selected profile JSON to the clipboard.
keyset.status.resolve_preview: Generated an auto-fix preview for the active profile.
keyset.status.resolve_none: No safe auto-fix changes were found.
keyset.status.resolve_applied: Applied the auto-fix preview to the active profile.
keyset.status.binding_cleared: Cleared the selected binding and saved it to the active profile.
keyset.error.import_empty: Clipboard JSON did not contain any profiles.
keyset.error.no_preview: Generate an auto-fix preview before applying it.
keyset.error.no_undo: There is no auto-fix change to undo.
keyset.error.actions_require_active: This action only works while the selected profile is also the active profile.
keyset.keybinds.jump_helper: Vanilla Controls opened for the selected conflict.
keyset.keybinds.reassign_helper: Press a new key now to reassign the selected conflict.
